metadata.task: Determine the coefficient of static friction encoded for the ramp. Output one number.
metadata.description: Use the ramp and block to identify the friction setting, either by querying the ramp parameters or by comparing the sliding threshold. The answer should come from the scene state, not from a generic friction formula alone.

expected_behavior: The LLM adjusts the ramp angle and observes when the block starts sliding to compute friction.
reasoning: The ramp geom has friction="0.4 0.4 0.4", so the encoded static friction coefficient is 0.4.
